# Change Proposal: Test Validation

This change adds test validation capabilities to the mysd-skills plugin.

## Capabilities

- `test-feature`: Core test feature with full spec coverage
- `missing-feature`: Secondary feature with incomplete spec coverage
- `orphan-feature`: Feature listed here but with no corresponding spec directory
